titleStmt.title: SII 17.656A: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 656A. (A.R. No. 605 A of 1904.)This is not noticed in the Annual Report. ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: ON THE SOUTH AND EAST BASE OF THE LAKSHMĪNĀRĀYAṆA PERUMĀL TEMPLE.
This inscription belongs to the reign of Maduraikoṇḍa Parakēsarivarman i.e., Parāntaka I and the portion containing the regnal year is damaged.

It records the gift of land by Kāppiyaṉ Eḻuvaṅ-Gaṅgādharaṉ (See No. 656 above) for burning a perpetual lamp to god Tirukkurakkutturai-pperumāṉaḍigaḷ in Mahēndramaṅgalam, the sabhā of which place made the land tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maturaikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu Āvatu brahmadeya mahe Eḻuvaṅkeṅkātirannen Ivvūrttirukkurakkuttuṟaip perumāṉaṭi kaḷukku tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum candrādityaval Ivvūr nilattuk kiḻ pirāṟu Eṉṉuṭaiya nilam nilattu muṉṟumāc cey tirunontā viḷak koṉṟu Erivatāka nīroṭu Aṭṭik kuṭutteṉ kāppiya
vaṅ keṅkādhiraṉeṉ Innilattukku Icaitta Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai śrīka yāṭaṉ ceykku tevarkku-viṭṭa nilam kiḻttāṉattu Eḻumāmukkāṇi nilattukku vaṭakkum śrīkaṇṭaṉ ceykkey nilattukkum teṉpāṟkkellai Eḻuvaṅ keṅkādharaṉiṉ ceykkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kkey kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻakku nokkippāynta vāykkut teṟku Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa ni
tiruviḷakku Oṉṟukkum candrādityaval Erivatāka nīroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭuttu In nilam muṉṟumāc ceyyālum vanta Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum veṭṭiyum vetiṉaiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟai pārt tepperppaṭṭatum vayal nilattuḷ kāṇi Epperppaṭṭaṉattilum nilavopāti Immuṉṟumānilamum Iṟai Ēṟṟikkoṇṭu la nāṉum Eṉ makkaḷ makkaḷum candrādityaval Immuṉṟumāc ceyyum Iṟai Iṟuppeṉāy Innilam nilattiṉ melellai
Iṟaiyili meṟcollappaṭṭa Eḻuvaṅ keṅkātiraṉeṉ tirukkurakkut tuṟaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku mahentramaṅkalattu sabhaiyomum Innilam Ivaṉ nilattiṉ meley Iṟai laikkuṟaviṟ m Ivaṉ Iṟaiyili ceyya Icaintu kuṭuttom sabhaiyom Ivvolai Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉ cen=taṉeṉaḻuvaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭikkuṭutteṉ kāppiyaṉ Eḻuvaṅ keṅkādharaṉeṉ Ivai Enṉeḻu
ttu
Digital edition of SII 17.656A by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
